'''âsh-l-z-sh''' ('''kashalzeshoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:west|west]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-l-z-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:west|west]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-l-z-sh
|-
! Lemma
| kashalzeshoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishalzeshoko|thishalzeshoko]] || [[word:jishalzeshoko|jishalzeshoko]] || [[word:shishalzeshoko|shishalzeshoko]] || [[word:kishalzeshoko|kishalzeshoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
